text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm out observing things at the<n>training track
when I notice Agnes<n>Digital doing the same.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how I love watching my Umas do<n>partner
runs! Look at them wordlessly<n>communicating
with their gazes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's because of you that I was able to<n>surpass
my own limits!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Come! Chase after me and catch me!<n>I know you
can do it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And who comes running after her but<n>her dearest
friend and rival! Oooh!<n>What unrestrained
passion!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Bravo! That was a splendid etude of<n>yours!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! O-Opera O?! Wh-wh-what are<n>you doing
here?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Curse myself for failing to blend into<n>the wall!
And worse, I've been<n>overheard fangirling about
my oshis!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My word, your skill at improv theater<n>is
phenomenal! Digital, would you be<n>interested in
taking the stage with me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There, we will project our voices<n>together in
operatic song, spreading<n>word of my great deeds
as Overlord<n>throughout the world!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh, Opera O's got another one<n>cornered...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
I heard she made a girl in the class<n>next to ours
perform her original opera<n>for eight hours
straight...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A moment, if you please. I also have<n>business
with Digital... as she is an<n>important subject of
my ongoing<n>observations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Tachyon too?! And... wow,<n>did you
just call me important?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I am currently studying the<n>mechanism by which
she transforms<n>her passion for Umamusume into<n>
power.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Tachyon's joined in too!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
I heard she made a student in the<n>class next to
ours participate in some<n>really terrifying
experiment...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital, why do you hesitate? Come!<n>Take my
hand at once!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've already prepared the laboratory<n>for my
experiment, and I'd like to start<n>testing my
hypotheses as soon as<n>possible.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what should I do? Ohhh, this<n>is terrible...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Being forced to choose between the<n>lesser of
two evils, Agnes Digital<n>appears understandably
conflicted.
choice_data_list:
It's okay to say no if you don't want to do either
one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Who said I don't want to do<n>what they're
asking me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sharing a stage with Opera O and<n>being a test
subject for Tachyon are<n>both dreams come true!
choice_data_list: Then why are you so upset?
Then why are you so upset?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Because I don't know if I'm worthy<n>of such
important tasks!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Can I truly live up to my oshis'<n>expectations? No
matter how much<n>research I do, I'm scared to
find out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Both Opera O and Tachyon have such<n>firm,
unwavering grasps on their own<n>worlds...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I would say the same for Agnes<n>Digital, but she
doesn't seem very<n>confident.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No, no, I can't... I'm no more than a<n>mere simp,
unworthy of coexisting on<n>the same plane as
them.
choice_data_list: But your oshis are the ones asking for your help!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right! What's my problem?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Straight to jail for me! Turning down a<n>request
from one's oshi is an offense<n>beyond
redemption!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Such considerations have no place<n>crossing a
fan's mind! The only<n>course of action here is to
accept all<n>requests!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I knew I was right in choosing you!<n>What an
open mind you have!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, it would be an intriguing<n>study to
observe you both performing<n>an opera together...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Teehuehue... If my fangirly delusions<n>can help out
my oshis, then I must<n>accept this honor without
fear!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital spends a great<n>many
hours both performing operas<n>and being under
observation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Could it be that the depthof my love for my oshis is beingtested here, in this very moment?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Causing my oshis trouble just<n>because I can't
make up my mind is<n>unacceptable! Inexcusable!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's a simp's job to have all herfaves' schedules memorized!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, please let me stand under<n>the spotlight
with you! We should be<n>able to borrow the stage
this<n>weekend!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a fine idea! We'll certainly need<n>one if we
are to entertain an audience!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Not only are you a skilled<n>playwright,
you even possess<n>fantastic managerial skills!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon, since we share the same<n>room, do you
think you could conduct<n>your observations in Ritto
Dorm?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you suggesting I observe you as<n>you
observe other Ritto residents? I<n>see. A very
reasonable suggestion.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And perhaps it will be me whom you<n>decide to
observe... Heh. This is sure<n>to be intriguing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I will devote every fiber of my being<n>to creating a
stupendous opera and<n>incredible study results!
